Possibly related to the fact, that we use cassandra 4.0.x in Montreal ?

This commit should be abandoned. The updates to SDC WFD to update dependency versions have broken the sdc workflow backend. Initial analysis suggests there is significant work needed to anaylse and fix the issues caused by the dependency updates.
For now we will stick with the existing versions of the SDC WFD images
